items.title: The Best "Magnificent Seven" Stocks to Buy in March
items.description: The market is gifting investors several potentially incredible buying opportunities.

items.title: Apple’s Cheaper Devices And F1 Deal Test Growth And Valuation
items.description: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) has introduced the MacBook Neo and iPhone 17e, targeting the budget-conscious segment of the device market. The company is also set to become the exclusive streaming partner for Formula 1, expanding its media and content footprint. These moves aim to reach students, first time buyers, and price sensitive consumers while deepening engagement in Apple's services ecosystem. Apple, trading at $257.46, sits in a position where recent share price moves have been mixed, with...

items.title: Magnificent 7 News: Microsoft Rebounds While Apple and Alphabet Fall This Week
items.description: It was a week that reminded investors how quickly the Magnificent 7 can splinter. AI optimism and fresh earnings momentum gave way to macro headwinds, geopolitical jitters, and stock-specific news pulling the cohort in opposite directions. The S&P 500 fell 1.98% for the week, and the Nasdaq 100 dropped 1.24%. The Magnificent 7 mirrored that ... Magnificent 7 News: Microsoft Rebounds While Apple and Alphabet Fall This Week

items.title: Before Retiring, Warren Buffett Dumped $4.5 Billion Worth of 2 AI Stocks and Established a New Position in This 174-Year-Old Company
items.description: Buffett continued to sell more stock than he bought in his last quarter as CEO.

items.title: TQQQ Holders Face a Risk That Has Nothing to Do With the Nasdaq Falling
items.description: TQQQ has delivered a 47.69% gain over the past year and 2,653.53% over the past decade. Those numbers explain why retail investors keep coming back to it. The appeal is simple: own the Nasdaq-100, but with the accelerator pressed to the floor. In a sustained bull market, that logic works extraordinarily well. The problem is ... TQQQ Holders Face a Risk That Has Nothing to Do With the Nasdaq Falling
